titles.title: I Want to Be a Family
Alma-chan Wants to Have a Family!
アルマちゃんは家族になりたい
Alma-chan Wants to Be a Family!

data.title: Alma-chan wa Kazoku ni Naritai
data.title_english: Alma-chan Wants to Be a Family!
data.title_japanese: アルマちゃんは家族になりたい
title_synonyms: I Want to Be a Family
Alma-chan Wants to Have a Family!
data.synopsis:
The Apotheosis Loyal Maneuver Arms—Alma—is the flagship prototype of Enji Kamisato and Suzume Yobane, two gifted researchers disillusioned by the arrogance of their peers. Although designed for combat, Alma's daily life ironically unfolds far from any battlefield, as she is fine-tuned for ordinary society. Nevertheless, within the modest household she shares with her creators-turned-parents, she learns the subtleties of being human little by little.

Meanwhile, Enji and Suzume, as self-proclaimed rivals, remain oblivious to how transparent their affection for each other truly is. Alma, observing their every exchange with methodical precision, is hardly deceived. As the pair continue their quarrels under the guise of research, Alma adapts to the rhythm of a homely life—finding comfort in the everyday shenanigans that make them a family.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Itsuka no Watashi Yori
data.synopsis: A short directed by loundraw. Made as a collaboration between Z-Kai Group, loundraw, and FLAT STUDIO.

data.title: Verbara Mini!
data.synopsis:
Oskar, Marie Antoinette, Andre, Fersen and others, portrayed as mini characters, visit a modern movie theater! It's all new to them and they are all in turmoil...?

(Source: verbara-movie Youtube)
data.background: Verbara Mini! are shown before the main feature film of Versailles no Bara.

data.title: Yuugao
data.synopsis: Tomoe, a strict and disciplined teacher, starts every working day with a genuine desire to teach students to be smart. Soon, she was respected and appreciated in the educational institution. It would seem that everything will continue like this, but lately, in the moonlight, the woman has been troubled by strange dreams. It started to make it difficult to focus on work, especially if there were male students nearby.

data.title: Xingchen Bian 6th Season
data.synopsis:
The story revolves around Qin Yu and his three brothers after ascending to the God Realm. As Qin Yu gradually learns the rules of the God Realm, he aspires to become the strongest craftsman god in order to marry Jiang Li, a member of one of the eight great families of the God Realm, whose status is vastly different from his own. Starting with eliminating bandits, he rises to become a high-level god, gaining the favor of the Holy Emperor and becoming a rising star… step by step, he finally reaches a position where he can openly propose to Jiang Li. 

However, faced with numerous suitors, the Jiang family, unable to choose, decides to hold a marriage contest for Jiang Li. Whoever can present three gifts that surpass the other competitors will win Jiang Li. Qin Yu endures hardships to forge an unprecedented first-class Primordial Spiritual Treasure as his final betrothal gift. He believes he has everything under control, but at the last moment, the Jiang family disregards fairness and declares Zhou Xian the winner. Qin Yu erupts in anger…

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Luffy, Law
data.synopsis:
It is the Great Age of Pirates. This is an unknown event that took place after the battle of Wano Country.

(Source: YouTube, translated)
data.background: Luffy, Law aired at MBS Anime Fes 2025. It was later released for free on YouTube.

titles.title: The Public Enemy of the Immortal World

data.title: Wo, Xiu Xianjie De Gongdi
title_synonyms: The Public Enemy of the Immortal World
data.synopsis:
One day, Li Wuwang suddenly awakens to find himself, as the villain, kidnapping Wan Zheng, the Holy Maiden of the Wan Chao Sect, and fleeing. Before Li Wuwang can even react, the "system" that appears before him quickly issues him a mission: strip the Destiny Points of the chosen one. Either complete the mission and survive, or fail and become an ant dying under the sword of the chosen protagonist.

(Source: Youku, translated)

data.title: Kemono no Namae
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Kemono no Namae by ROTH BART BARON, featuring HANA.

data.title: Douzhan Tianxia
data.synopsis: The mysterious young man Dafeng rescued Li Huamei, who was seriously ill after being plotted against. Dafeng wanted to go to Kyoto to find his senior sister and happened to be on the same road with Li Huamei. On the way, Li Huamei was shocked to find that her senior sister was the Queen Qin Zhao, and the Queen repeatedly sent assassins to kill her. In order to find out the reason, Dafeng and Li Huamei entrusted their lives to each other and fought against the enemy together. Disputes arose in the rivers and lakes, and the court struggles became more intense. The two were unknowingly involved in a treacherous conspiracy, and Dafeng was the key to solving all the mysteries...

data.title: Discover Paldea
data.synopsis:
The shorts center on four Paldean Trainers as well as their Pokemon, being Pikachu, Paldean Wooper, Milotic and Hydrapple, taking part in activities from Pokemon Scarlet and Violet.

(Source: Bulbapedia)

data.title: Voices
data.synopsis: Music video for the song voices by SAKANAMON.

data.title: Amedama
data.synopsis:
The other kids at the park never ask Dong-Dong to play. That's ok. He's fine just playing marbles on his own. One day, he buys a bag of colorful candies instead of new marbles. The first time he pops one of them into his mouth, his old sofa starts talking to him! The two share an unexpected conversation before the sweet melts away. As it happens, the people, animals, and objects in Dong-Dong's life have a lot to say.

(Source: Official Site)
data.background: The film was nominated in the Best Animated Short Film category at the 97th Academy Award.

data.title: Yoru Neko
data.synopsis:
In the mysterious realm of the Cat Planet, cats of diverse forms roam, and amidst them prowls a lonely Fire Cat. A twist of fate unfolds when a Water Cat materializes one day, sparking a fleeting camaraderie that tragically results in the inadvertent vaporization of the Water Cat by the heat of flames. The crestfallen Fire Cat, therefore, endeavors to reclaim the essence of the Water Cat and embarks on a brave journey…

(Source: Tokyo Anime Award Festival)
data.background: Graduate Work 2023 by Junjian Lin, Tama Art University. Winner of the grand prize at the 5th Xunguang Microcosm Award.

titles.title: 魔術師クノンは見えている

data.title: Majutsushi Kunon wa Mieteiru
data.title_japanese: 魔術師クノンは見えている
data.synopsis:
Kunon Gurion is born without sight. Refusing to accept blindness as an unchangeable fate, he devotes himself to water magic. His series of personal experiments quickly reveals his talents, as Kunon's grasp of magic grows at a pace that surpasses even those tasked with teaching him.

Through constant trial and invention, he develops methods of perceiving the world that do not rely on ordinary vision, reshaping water into constructs that allow him to navigate his surroundings. His ingenuity and rapid progress soon draw attention beyond his lessons, setting him on a path of discovery that tests the very limits of possibility—as well as of his own body.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Vision
data.synopsis:
Eyes are magical spheres that make up dreams and retain memories. In our eyes, the visions of the within and of the beyond overlap. New worlds come to be when our gazes meet.

(Source: Geidai Animation)
